title: Basic Intervals (Numeric)
description: Learn to instantly recognize the distance between two notes on the staff (2nds, 3rds, 4ths, 5ths, etc.).

sessions.title: Steps and Skips
sessions.description: Learn to tell the difference between 2nds and 3rds on sight.
sessions.prompt: Explain musical intervals, focusing on 2nds (steps) and 3rds (skips). Teach the visual trick: 2nds always go line-to-space, while 3rds go line-to-line or space-to-space. Provide an exercise requiring the user to identify and play harmonic and melodic 2nds and 3rds.

sessions.title: The Wider Jumps
sessions.prompt: Introduce 4ths and 5ths. Discuss the visual pattern: 4ths always change from a line to a space (skipping a line/space in between), while 5ths stay on lines or spaces (line-skip line-line). Provide exercises for recognizing and playing these larger intervals.

levels.criteria: Can visually identify the numeric size of an interval without counting lines.
